description: CloudSentinel shift-right pipeline integrity contract for detection, normalization, OPA remediation levels, reporting, and enforcement.
invariants: All required inputs must exist, be non-empty, and be valid JSON before processing.
Any runtime error, malformed payload, or missing artifact fails the stage immediately.
TLS verification for external APIs is mandatory; custom CAs must be installed instead of disabling verification.
Detection, normalization, decision, reporting, and enforcement must each emit machine-readable JSON audit events.

remediation_levels.L0: INFO/LOW output-type findings - audit trail only, GATE=PASS
remediation_levels.L1: LOW resource findings - audit WARN only, GATE=PASS
remediation_levels.L2: MEDIUM/HIGH findings - alert + ticket required, GATE=PASS if ticket created
remediation_levels.L3: CRITICAL with custodian_policy - auto-remediation + verification + ticket, GATE=PASS if verified

gate_invariants: HARD FAIL if OPA deny[] non-empty
HARD FAIL if L3 custodian ran live and verify-remediation FAILED
HARD FAIL if L3 findings present and reconciliation ticket not created
SOFT_PASS if L3 findings present and custodian in dry-run
HARD FAIL if L3 findings present and custodian not executed in live mode
SOFT_PASS if L2 findings present and reconciliation ticket not created
PASS if L2 only and ticket created

invariants: drift.exit_code must be 0 or 2
errors array must be empty
cloudsentinel.correlation_id is engine-scoped
cloudsentinel.pipeline_correlation_id equals CLOUDSENTINEL_PIPELINE_CORRELATION_ID
if drift.detected == true then drift.items length > 0
if drift.detected == false then drift.items length == 0
opa_drift.violations length == drift.items length
effective_violations <= violations
l0_count + l1_count + l2_count + l3_count == effective_violations length
each effective violation has remediation_level in [L0,L1,L2,L3]
block_reason IN [deny, auto_remediation_required, ticket_and_notify_required, manual_review_only, none]
L0/L1 never require external alert, ticket, or Custodian
L2 requires alert and reconciliation ticket
L3 requires alert, Custodian execution path, verification, and reconciliation ticket
if l3_count > 0 then requires_auto_remediation == true
if l2_count > 0 then requires_ticket == true
if l3_count > 0 then requires_ticket == true
report conversion must preserve source finding counts
HTTP response code from DefectDojo must be 201
reporting cannot synthesize empty payloads when source data is non-empty
Custodian execution plan must be derived only from OPA effective_violations
Every Custodian target must have remediation_level == L3, requires_remediation == true, custodian_policy non-empty, and ARM resource_id starting with /subscriptions/
Custodian must execute generated resource_id-scoped policies only; broad policy execution is forbidden
custodian validate must pass for original and resource_id-scoped policies before any remediation command runs
Any validation failure aborts remediation before cloud state changes
remediation_metrics.json must expose counters.remediated, counters.failed, counters.ignored, and counters.verified
GATE_STATUS and GATE_REASON must be written for every terminal state

GATE_REASON IN [opa_drift_deny, opa_prowler_deny, l3_verification_failed, l3_ticket_missing, l3_custodian_dry_run, l3_custodian_not_executed, l2_ticket_not_created, l2_workflow_complete, no_actionable_findings, l3_verified_workflow_complete, terminal_state_unresolved]
GATE_TOTAL_L0 through GATE_TOTAL_L3 must equal OPA dotenv level totals
L2 completed with ticket exits 0
L2 without ticket exits SOFT_PASS with GATE_REASON=l2_ticket_not_created
L3 live remediation must be verified before PASS
